item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Crispy fried pork with noodles in an intense broth and freshly cut vegetables. (2+7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Aromatic marinated tofu with noodles in an intense broth and freshly cut vegetables. (2+7+8+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Summer closure Grab&Go Grab&Go is still available in the fridge as usual. Take-away

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: North Indian chicken tikka masala with garlic naan, topped with namkeen. Served with Indian rice salad, raita and pickled red onions. Also available gluten-free. (1+6+15) GREEN DISH: Dish North Indian paneer tikka masala with garlic naan, topped with namkeen. Served with Indian rice salad, raita and pickled red onions. Also available gluten-free. (1+6+15)
